Package com.solace.connector.test.resources.resource

package com.solace.connector.test.resources.resource
Resources managed by the PubSubPlusExtension for integration testing.
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    com.solace.connector.test.resources
    Provides utilities and resources to support micro-integration testing.
    com.solace.connector.test.resources.annotation
    Convenient builders for instantiating resource annotation objects from an extension class.
  • Class
    Description
    ConnectorArgsBuilder
    A builder class for constructing command-line arguments for micro-integration applications.
    ManagementQueue
    Provision an exclusive management queue on the Solace broker.
    SempV2Api
    A wrapper for the SEMPv2 API that provides access to the Solace Event Broker's management interface.
    SolaceMessaging
    A utility to either:
    - generate traffic on a workflow in the `Solace -> Vendor` direction OR
    - retrieve messages that were processed by a workflow in the `Vendor -> Solace` direction and assert for correctness

    Currently, this utility assumes that the Solace input and output destinations are always Queues.
    SolaceMessaging.ExcludeMessageFromExpectedCountException
    Exception that can be thrown by message validators to indicate that a specific message should be excluded from the expected message count.
    SolaceQueue
    Provision a queue on the Solace broker.
